description_long: This object is a rectangular stone block with a flat top surface featuring alternating black and white marble-like stripes running parallel across its length. The stripes are evenly spaced, giving the block a visually striking, modern appearance. The sides of the block are solid black, contrasting sharply with the patterned top. The block appears dense and heavy, likely constructed from solid stone or concrete with a decorative marble finish on the upper surface. Its proportions suggest it is designed as a low barrier or platform, suitable for urban environments such as plazas, sidewalks, or public parks. There are no visible joints, engravings, or separable parts, indicating a monolithic construction.
description: A rectangular stone block with a striped black and white marble-patterned top and solid black sides, appearing dense and modern.
description_view_0: Front view shows the striped marble top with horizontal lines and solid black front face.
description_view_1: Side view reveals the stripes running lengthwise and the solid black side face.
description_view_2: Rear view mirrors the front, with horizontal stripes and a solid black rear face.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing lengthwise stripes and a solid black side face.
attribute_location_context: urban sidewalk or plaza as a decorative barrier or seating element
attribute_installation_method: set in concrete or on a leveled foundation
attribute_weathering_pattern: No visible weathering; the surface appears clean and well-maintained with no chips or discoloration.
attribute_integration_with_surrounding_s: isolated or aligned in a row with similar blocks
